subcodes.first_line: Thou art He whom We caused to hear, in the earliest days, the rustling of Our Lote-Tree, the murmuring of the Kawthar of Our utterance, and the shrill voice of Our Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انت الذی اسمعناک فی اول الایام حفیف سدرتی و خریر کوثر بیانی و صریر قلمی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
